counters.description: this is my ban - get this off the table asap especially higher elo. check the tier list below for more info for threats. anything s or a tier make sure to control ward your other buff and command your team to help respond to invades
very annoying match up - dont let him scale. he wont bother you early game but just make sure to get on the map early. this is a skill match up. if it goes late, win vision and avoid him.

hecarim is too fast for our boy - this is a skill match up too. he can cancel you with his ult and his charge so avoid these and you can win. you have similar play style but he get can on the map quicker. most hecs to do a 3 camp clear into gank so try and counter gank early.

a good nunu can run away with the game early. i usually drop my control ward in the pixel bush bot lane to avoid any lvl 2 shenanigans. you will need to ask your laners to ward his jg camps pre spawn too. if he gets ahead early its hard to come back.

same as graves but more kill pressure. ward your non primary starting buff and ask for leash in this match up. throw your effigy down in either the baron pit or dragon pit before camps spawn to catch out any shenanigans.
he can one shot you late - ward and track him effectively. you are more useful than him but a good rengar one trick can ruin your day.

very strong early - will try get on the map lvl 3. try and counter what you can. you probably wont kill but you will stop the snowball. post this go back to farming - you outscale - try and counter gank where you can and get deep wards down.

alot of fiddle mains have issues with this match up. just use vision to avoid him and waste his time. hard farm and ping your laners. you outscale hard. try and counter gank when u hit 6+. most olafs get cocky because of early game power - use this against them to snowball and waste their time.
lucky we barely see him in the jg. he completly counters your ult. stick to other priority targets or try and nuke him if he is full ap with your fear. only if you are very far ahead try this.
can be a pain in the ass if counter jungling effectively. most lee's try and get out at lvl 3 so again, ward your other buff and try to counter gank or track to ping the laner he is pathing to.

synergies.description: very good setup for fiddle with his taunt - just be careful that you don't have too much ap on your team
very potent duo - he can protect you early and leave you to scale into the monster you can become
same as talon but with new buffs even better. can protect you early and allow you to get advantages.
ali / leo are best supps for fiddle enablement
really great cc and setup, can front line and bait for you too.
best adc for season 11 - cant really beat her with anything else
very good top laner to play with. fiddle ult + shen ult is potent combo
very good setup for fiddle with his taunt - just be careful that you don't have too much ap on your team
very potent duo - he can protect you early and leave you to scale into the monster you can become
